decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: centered — everything stacked in the middle
hero_cta_style: floating action buttons with hover effects
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
card_style: cards with colored left/top accent border
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
contact_style: big bold email as hero text
bonus_quirk: all external links open with a subtle tooltip preview
